6800萬，車路士要再報價辛祖

據英媒《泰晤士報》報道，車路士並沒有放棄引進阿歷士-辛祖的計劃，他們準備向祖雲達斯送上一份6100萬英鎊(約合6800萬歐元)的新報價求購這位巴西左閘。

祖雲達斯在今年夏天已經多次拒絕了車路士對阿歷士-辛祖的報價。這位巴西左閘和祖雲達斯的合同將於2020年6月到期，斑馬軍團正在和他討論續約問題。

《泰晤士報》和《太陽報》均稱，車路士並沒有放棄引進阿歷士-辛祖的計劃，為了説服祖雲達斯放人，藍軍準備向斑馬軍團提供一份6100萬英鎊(約合6800萬歐元)的新報價。

《Football Italia》表示，祖雲達斯高層此前已經明確表示，他們無意出售阿歷士-辛祖，除非球員本人要求離隊，這位巴西左閘目前並沒有提出過離隊請求。

消息参考来源: football-italia

Valencia are not prepared to accept less than €25m for wing-back Joao Cancelo, a transfer target for Juventus and Inter.

The Portugal international is only 23 years old and can play in any role down the right wing, effectively mirroring Juve’s Alex Sandro on the left.

According to SuperDeporte, Valencia have placed a price-tag of at least €25m on Cancelo and will not budge from it.

It’s reported the player is ready for a change of scenery and his agent Jorge Mendes is in negotiations with several Italian clubs this month.

Juve are believed to be offering €17m plus Mario Lemina, while Inter hope to involve Valencia’s negotiations for Jeison Murillo and interest in Geoffrey Kondogbia.

Juventus seem to have missed out on one of their midfield targets, as Chelsea’s Nemanja Matic is ready for Manchester United.

The Bianconeri had suggested Matic as one of the potential additions to their squad, along with Blaise Matuidi of Paris Saint-Germain and Sevilla’s Steven N’Zonzi.

According to multiple reports this afternoon, Manchester United have reached an agreement with Chelsea for Matic.

The asking price had been around £50m, which was already more than enough to put Juventus off the idea.

Manchester United went all-in for Matic just days after their first choice, Radja Nainggolan, extended his Roma contract.

“It was a good first half. We’re now preparing for the Supercoppa,” the Coach said after the game.

“It’s the first trophy of the season and we have to win it. It was important to return [to Italy] without any injuries.

“The new faces still have to plug themselves in and get used to our workloads, but I’m happy with the spirit shown by the lads in matches and training.

Liverpool and Tottenham target Douglas Costa has lifted the lid on why he moved to Juventus this summer.

The Brazilian has joined the Italian champions from Bayern Munich on season-long loan for an initial fee of £5.3million, but he can sign for them permanently for £35.4m next summer.

Prior to the move, the winger was linked with Liverpool and Tottenham but he has now explained he picked Juve as he believes he can win the Champions League there.

"I feel good, you train so hard here," Costa told Gazzetta dello Sport.

"I've just started to get to the same pace as my teammates. I know I'm still a bit behind and I have to reach the level of the others, but I'm working to get in shape as soon as possible.

"Why Juventus? Because in three years they played two Champions League finals, they're the team with the most desire and the most opportunities to win the Champions League.

"I want to enter into the history of this club. One year out from the World Cup, I couldn't have chosen a better club.

"I'm here to win everything, including the Champions League."

Italian champions Juventus have renewed their interest in Jose Gimenez and have held further talks with the player's representatives.

The Atletico Madrid defender's future has been under scrutiny all summer due to interest from clubs in England and Italy.

Liverpool and Manchester United are believed to have been keeping tabs on the Uruguay international and Roma have also been linked with a move this summer.

But Juventus have been laying the groundwork for a potential swoop on the defender and have been in regular contact with the player's agent.

Last month his representative, Paco Casal, was spotted with Juventus sporting director Fabio Paratici and the two were discussing a deal to take Gimenez to Turin.

And according to Tuttosport, Paratici and Casal held further meetings on Wednesday as Juventus continue to keep tabs on his situation at Atletico.

Gimenez is still undecided about leaving Spain and has also not ruled out the possibility of putting pen-to-paper on a new contract with the club.

Atletico are also not keen on losing players this summer as they won't be allowed to replace them until January because of a transfer ban.

有意大利媒體宣稱，希克下週一將會再次接受體檢，而祖雲達斯也在考慮重新給出報價。

希克原本接近以3000萬歐元的價格轉投尤文，但這筆交易因為這位捷克國腳在體檢中被檢查出心臟存在微小問題而告吹。

在經歷了一段時間的休養之後，希克昨天已經回到了桑普開始備戰新賽季，而如今來自《拖連奴體育報》的報道宣稱，這位鋒線球星下週一將會在羅馬再次接受身體檢查。

該報道進一步表示，尤文依然對希克感興趣，並且有可能會再次給出一份租借加買斷權的報價，同時協議中的買斷權在達成一定的條件之後將會變成強制買斷條款。

另一家意大利媒體Premiun Sport則表示，希克已經拒絕了桑普的續約合同以及國米的邀請，原因是他只想去尤文。

Juventus could turn their attention to Real Madrid midfielder Mateo Kovacic as well as signing Blaise Matuidi.

The Bianconeri are trying to balance the squad this summer with the addition of players like Douglas Costa and Federico Bernardeschi, but the priority remains a central midfielder to bring stability to the centre of the pitch.

Negotiations with Paris Saint-Germain continue for the possible transfer of Blaise Matuidi but Juve not resting on their laurels and may work on signing two midfielders.

According to Corriere Dello Sport, the Bianconeri were offered Croatian midfielder Mateo Kovacic by Real Madrid, a player who has struggled to settle in his two seasons in the Spanish capital.

The 23-year-old is reportedly keen to get regular playing time and would prefer to return to Italy where he previously played for Inter Milan.

Corriere report the player’s entourage have offered the player to Juve, with Real’s consent, on loan with an obligation to buy the player at €25m plus bonuses.

Lemina turns 24 next month and was signed from Olympique Marseille in 2015 for €10.5m.

Last season he made 29 competitive appearances for Juve, scoring one goal.

Barcelona continue to be linked with Paulo Dybala, as Italian papers claim they are offering €120m or cash plus Andres Iniesta, Rafinha or Andre Gomes, but Juventus hold firm.

With Neymar buying himself out of his contract for €222m to join Paris Saint-Germain, the Blaugrana need a replacement and have cash to burn.

Several fan polls have put Dybala top of the list of ideal signings and it’s believed his Argentina teammate Lionel Messi is also pushing for La Joya.

According to the Corriere dello Sport, Barcelona are offering €120m cash or a sum of €90m plus Iniesta, who had already been linked with a Juve move earlier this summer.

La Gazzetta dello Sport put the proposal at €120m cash (rising to €140m with various agent’s fees) or cash plus Andre Gomes and Rafinha.

Both Italian papers insist Juventus are resisting the bids and intend to keep Dybala.

Barcelona are more likely to head for Liverpool and poach ex-Inter star Philippe Coutinho for around €100m.

Official: Verona sign Caceres
By Football Italia staff

Verona have officially confirmed the signing of former Juventus and Barcelona defender Martin Caceres.

The Uruguayan international has been training with the Butei for several days, proving his fitness after he played just once last season in his spell with Southampton.

“Hellas Verona FC announces the signing of the player Martin Caceres, who has signed a contract until June 30, 2018,” a statement on the club’s official website confirmed.

Caceres spent six seasons with Juventus across two spells, but injuries meant he never made more than 20 Serie A appearances in a single season.

Mino Raiola is pushing for Moise Kean to leave Juventus on loan with option to buy, as PEC Zwolle, ADO den Haag, Bologna, Crotone and Verona are interested.

The striker made history as the first player born in the year 2000 to score a Serie A goal.

The 17-year-old is represented by super-agent Raiola and Tuttosport outline several alternatives for his imminent future.

Juventus want to keep Kean in the squad at least until January, but he wouldn’t get much playing time.

Raiola is eager to send the forward abroad to Zwolle or ADO den Haag in the Netherlands, whereas Serie A sides interested include Bologna, Crotone and Hellas Verona.

Another potential avenue would be to sell Kean for €15-20m and include a buy-back option, essentially similar to the deal that took Alvaro Morata from Real Madrid to Juve.

Juventus to pay €25m cash or include Mario Lemina or Tomas Rincon in the deal for Valencia defender Joao Cancelo, claims La Gazzetta dello Sport.

The right-back can also play in a more advanced role and even as part of a trident attack, making him a valuable addition to Max Allegri’s tactically versatile side.

Super Deportes report Cancelo handed in a transfer request, but Valencia have set the price-tag at €25m.

According to La Gazzetta dello Sport, the Bianconeri aim to lower this by including a midfielder as part of the deal.

It would be either Gabon international Lemina or January signing Rincon, who are both on the way out.

Cancelo is the main target, as the 23-year-old Portugal international has an eye for goal, scoring three in four senior caps for his country.

Valencia paid €15m to take Cancelo from Benfica two years ago.

補強中場，尤文總監考察尼桑斯

據意媒《Libero》報道，祖雲達斯體育總監帕拉蒂奇今天赴現場觀看了西維爾對陣愛華頓的友誼賽，他此行的目的是為了考察尼桑斯的表現。

尼桑斯和西維爾的合同中設有4000萬歐元的解約金條款。斑馬軍團此前曾向西維爾求購過尼桑斯，不過雙方在轉會費問題方面談不攏，這筆交易被暫時擱置了下來。

祖雲達斯在當地時間的週六在溫布萊大球場和熱刺進行了一場友誼賽，最終斑馬軍團0-2輸給了熱刺。《Libero》稱，祖雲達斯在這場比賽中的表現不太好，中場的問題再次凸顯，斑馬軍團主帥艾歷尼堅持要求俱樂部高層引進尼桑斯或者馬度迪。

祖雲達斯在昨天和修咸頓就勒美拿的轉會達成了協議，聖徒將向斑馬軍團支付1800萬歐元轉會費，此外合同中還設有200萬歐元的獎金條款。《Libero》表示，祖雲達斯將把出售勒美拿所得的轉會費用於引援補強中場。

The Comune di Bergamo has officially announced that Atalanta have bought the Stadio Atleti Azzurri d’Italia.

The Orobici were named as the preferred bidder for the ground back in May, having agreed to pay 10 per cent more than the asking price.

Today it has been confirmed that the contract has been signed, which means the club will pay €8,608,600 to own the arena, with a further €2.6m for the partial redevelopment of the ground carried out in 2015.

Atalanta now have two months to present their plan to redevelop the stadium, which will include rebuilding the two curve.

There’s also 2,000m set aside for commercial and tertiary functions, and a six-year lease worth €25,000 per year has been agreed for the Lazzaretto car park.

留隊，列治史迪拿不會離開尤文

據《全尤文》報道，列治史迪拿會繼續留在祖雲達斯效力。

《米蘭體育報》在昨天曾報道，列治史迪拿收到了尼斯和一家德甲俱樂部的轉會邀請，他很可能在今年夏天轉會離開。祖雲達斯準備引進華倫西亞的祖奧簡斯路作為他的替代者，不過他們需要面對國際米蘭的競爭。

《全尤文》對此事進行了跟進，並帶來了新的消息。這家網站援引了德國媒體的消息，稱禾夫斯堡向列治史迪拿發出了邀請，但列治史迪拿希望留在祖雲達斯，他和他的家人在拖連奴城過得很好，這位瑞士邊衞會履行完他和祖雲達斯的合同。

列治史迪拿與祖雲達斯的合同將在2018年6月到期。

魯加尼日前在接受採訪時表示，祖雲達斯經常被批評特別正常，這是因為他們受到了很高的關注。

　　祖雲達斯即將與拉素進行意大利超級盃，魯加尼強調現在全隊的注意力都集中在了這場比賽上。

　　他在接受天空體育和Mediaset Premium採訪時說：「球隊要爭取拿到新賽季的第一座冠軍獎盃，當然我們都很清楚這會是一場決賽，一場徹徹底底的硬仗。我們已經做好了最充分的準備，目標只有一個那就是勝利，因為全隊上下都非常渴望將這座獎盃帶回家。」

　　在球隊0-2不敵熱刺的比賽賽後，祖雲達斯受到了外界很大的質疑。魯加尼對此選擇坦然面對，他表示這是因為球隊受關注度太高。

　　「經常被批評是很正常的事情，因為我們是祖雲達斯。我們受到了外界很高的關注，這絕對要遠超其他球隊。這也是我們嚴格要求自己的原因，球隊必須要不斷取得進步。我覺得新賽季對我來說格外重要，我會試著極可能地快速成長。」他補充道。

　　（來自 肆客足球）

The Dutch international is out of contract in June 2018, and so far he hasn’t signed a new deal with the Biancocelesti.

According to Corriere dello Sport, there’s an offer on the table to renew until 2022, with a salary significantly higher than the €1.3m per season he currently earns.

However, Juve are also interested in the centre-back, but were put off of a move this summer by the Aquile’s €40m asking price.

Given his contract situation though, De Vrij can sign a pre-contract agreement with the Old Lady in January, before moving at the end of his Lazio deal.

The newspaper believes the Bianconeri are offering a five-year deal, starting in 2018 and finishing in 2023, worth €2.5m per season plus bonuses.

La Repubblica claim Geoffrey Kondogbia’s agent offered him to Juventus, but Valencia seem the only real contenders for the Inter rebel.

The 24-year-old was bought from Monaco in the summer of 2015 for €36m and has fallen progressively down the pecking order at San Siro.

On Friday, he caused uproar when refusing to turn up for training, infuriating Coach Luciano Spalletti.

While Valencia confirmed they made an offer, the Nerazzurri won’t release Kondogbia for less than €30m.

It’s possible the Spaniards could include players to lower the price-tag, such as Joao Cancelo or Ezequiel Garay.

However, La Repubblica newspaper now claim that Kondogbia’s representatives contacted Juventus to ask if they were interested in making a bid.

The Bianconeri have been seeking a rugged midfielder all summer and at the moment seem closer to Paris Saint-Germain veteran Blaise Matuidi.

Other sources note Juve are trying to coax Kevin Strootman from Roma, although he has a €45m release clause in his contract.

Atalanta Coach Gian Piero Gasperini hints Leonardo Spinazzola will get his early move to Juventus. “Lately the players make the decisions.”

The wing-back didn’t make the trip to Valencia for last night’s friendly win, nor did he take part in this evening’s 1-1 draw with Venezia.

It’s reported he is trying to force a transfer to Juve, who already own his contract, but he is only midway through a two-year loan deal.

“Lately there are situations where the players make the decisions with those who are around them,” Gasperini told reporters.

“Spinazzola knows what I think and I am disappointed with him. In football it can happen that a Coach makes plans, but then it’s up to the club.

“In any case, this was an eventuality that we had predicted. We had a good pre-season thanks to a group that worked really hard.

“In Serie A it’s important to pick up points straight away, so the opening round is just as important as the final one. So far we’ve been solid, but for the Europa League we’ll need a lot more and I am not kidding myself.”

艾歷尼：我們的表現堪稱醜陋

祖雲達斯2-3負於拉素無緣意大利超級盃。據Football-italia報道，賽後，艾歷尼承認尤文表現醜陋，拉素理應贏得超級盃。

在恩莫比尼梅開二度之後，保羅戴巴拿的兩粒進球使尤文一度回到正軌，但補時階段佐敦-盧卡古突破迪斯古利奧後傳中，為穆爾吉亞送上絕殺助攻。

賽後，艾歷尼對Rai電視台體育頻道説：“我們的丟球是愚蠢的，拉素理應獲勝，他們表現更好，我們直到第60分鐘左右才如夢方醒。”

“我們現在就必須要明白，這將是一個艱難的賽季。拉素踢得敏鋭而快速，我們也把握住了機會。我們應該將比賽拖入加時的，但是不論如何拉素配得上冠軍。”

尤文換下古亞達度，換上D.哥斯達，這一換人明顯改變了比賽進程。

“D.哥斯達上場以後我們能更好地利用場地寬度，打開拉素的空當，老實説，我們上半場就應該這樣踢。”

“我們的季前訓練開始較晚，有些球員身體狀態不佳。我知道球隊有困難，但我認為上半時比賽我們應該控制得更好。”

“我們的表現堪稱醜陋。拉素理應獲勝。我們似乎還沒準備好，很遺憾我們沒能完成這個賽季的第一個目標，但是從下週末開始我們該贏球了。”

“勝利不是別人給你的，而是自己爭取得到的。這是艱難的一年。兩年前我們在上海擊敗拉素拿到了超級盃，但是意甲開局卻一塌糊塗，所以我希望今年尤文能以另一種方式開啟意甲新賽季。”

消息参考来源: Football-italia

Kevin Strootman insists he has never talked to anyone from Juventus and is “only thinking” about the new season with Roma.

Reports last week suggested Juve were pushing to sign Strootman, a year after they poached Miralem Pjanic from the Giallorossi, but the Dutchman made it clear there was no truth in the speculation.

“Personally, I feel good and ready for the new season, but I think everyone worked well,” he said after Sunday’s 4-1 defeat to Celta Vigo.

“We didn’t see it today, but we’ve been doing the right things in training and we have to be ready for next Saturday. That’s the most important thing.

“Squad for the Scudetto? If we say that we’re a Scudetto team and then lose a game, you’ll attack us immediately.

“We have to make it clear during each game that we want to do great things with this team, without mentioning the League now. Maybe we’ll talk about it in February or March…

“Juventus? I haven’t talked to anyone. If you write something, I don’t always have to answer it.

“I’m only thinking about Roma, I’m always on the pitch, training with my teammates, and I don’t have to answer everything.”

迪巴拉：祖雲要改變態度，這一周加倍努力訓練
在意大利超級杯2-3輸給拉素之後，前鋒迪巴拉嚴厲地批評了祖雲達斯的比賽態度，稱之為“一種小球隊的心態”。
在0-2落後的情況下，迪巴拉連下兩城追和，眼看比賽就要進入加時，拉素在補時階段絕殺了斑馬軍團。
“這場比賽我們該輸，拉素完全應該獲勝，儘管我們在接近尾聲的時候扳平，”迪巴拉告訴祖雲電視台。“如果進入加時賽，我們有機會贏下比賽，但我們的表現並不好，結果表明了他們配得上勝利。”
“在前15分鐘，我們踢得很好，對拉素展開了進攻，很有侵略性，本來有機會取得入球。但我們不能變成這樣的態度，用這種心態踢50-60分鐘。我們必須重新開始，考慮下一場比賽，明白我們必須變得更加成熟，因為今晚我們看到的是一隊小球隊的心態。我們希望立即改變態度，因為這不是真正的祖雲，我們都知道這一點。我們必須更加成熟，在這週好好訓練，準備好對卡利亞里的重要比賽。”
迪巴拉在本場比賽中射入了精彩的自由球，隨後冷靜地射入12碼，但他拒絕了大家的讚美。“就個人而言，我對自己的表現並不滿意，雖然我攻入了2球，但踢得並不好，我認為這周自己也需要加倍努力工作，因為我們需要在卡利亞里的比賽中為意甲新賽季取得一個良好的開端。”

Reports emerged on Monday morning that Juve were planning one, final push for Keita, but Claudio Lotito reiterated the winger would only leave on his club’s terms.

“The Coach made his decisions based on what the players showed him during the week,” the President said after the Aquile’s Supercoppa victory over the Old Lady.

“If you have a player who trains with determination and, the day before the game, says ‘boss, I don’t feel like playing’, I don’t think a Coach would send him on to the pitch.

“I’ll never interfere with the Coach’s decisions. We haven’t talked to Juve, we haven’t sold him, we received several offers from clubs in Italy and abroad, but the player refused them.

“We’ve already said that we’ll sell the player to any team once they make us an acceptable offer, not vice versa.”

Lazio value the 22-year-old at €30m, despite his contract expiring next summer.

據意媒《Sport Mediaset》報道，祖雲達斯希望在今年夏天引進拉素的A.巴迪-基達和迪華積。

A.巴迪-基達和迪華積與拉素的合同都是在2018年6月到期，祖雲達斯對這兩位球員很感興趣。

祖雲達斯高層和拉素高層將在未來48小時內進行會面，討論A.巴迪-基達和迪華積的轉會。

《Sport Mediaset》表示，拉素對A.巴迪-基達的標價為3000萬歐元，對迪華積的標價則是2000萬歐元。

拉素在上週日3-2擊敗祖雲達斯，贏得了意大利超級盃冠軍。A.巴迪-基達沒有入選這場比賽的大名單，藍鷹主席洛蒂託在賽後接受採訪時表示，只要收到合適的報價，他們願意把A.巴迪-基達賣給任何俱樂部。

Inter are working with Valencia to enact a loan swap sending Geoffrey Kondogbia to Spain in exchange for Joao Cancelo, but Jeison Murillo is delayed.

According to Sky Sport Italia, the two clubs are moving towards a series of deals in the closing weeks of the transfer window.

Kondogbia could be suspended indefinitely after walking out on training in his attempts to force a move to the Mestalla.

The Nerazzurri want to solve two issues in one fell swoop by getting a new full-back and getting Kondogbia out of their squad.

It would be an exchange of one-season loans with options to buy in June 2018.

Cancelo has also been heavily linked with Juventus, but they seem to be going for Leonardo Spinazzola, who is midway through his two-year loan with Atalanta.

Chelsea and Tottenham Hotspur were interested in the 23-year-old Portugal international too.

However, Valencia will have to wait a little longer for Murillo, as the clubs have agreed terms, but Inter won’t let the Colombian leave until a replacement has been found.

Coach Luciano Spalletti did complain that they were “very short” in defence going into this weekend’s Serie A opener against Fiorentina.

根據迪馬濟奧網站的報道，車路士目前依然在嘗試引進祖雲達斯的左閘阿歷士-辛祖。

阿歷士-辛祖今年夏天一直被看成是車路士的目標，藍軍甚至據説曾經報價6000萬歐元，不過祖雲達斯始終不願意放走這位巴西國腳。

在車路士新賽季遭遇開門黑之後，有關干地要求俱樂部繼續補強陣容的説法也更多出現在了媒體的版面上。

在這種情況下，迪馬濟奧網站的報道相信，儘管尤文目前不願意放人，但車路士還是打算再次向阿歷士-辛祖發起攻勢。

上個月還有媒體報道稱，尤文對阿歷士-辛祖的要價在7000萬至7500萬歐元之間。

倫敦晚旗報：車路士希望辛祖向尤文遞交轉會申請

英媒《倫敦晚旗報》在北京時間昨日晚上報道，車路士沒有放棄求購祖雲達斯左閘阿歷士-辛祖，但車路士和干地希望球員能夠向尤文遞交轉會申請。

《倫敦晚旗報》原文。

《晚旗報》指，車路士在當地時間8月14日再向尤文問價，尤文表示拒絕。不過，車路士仍未放棄，但希望辛祖能夠首先遞交轉會申請。

據悉，車路士此前兩次報價，分別達到5200萬英鎊和6100萬英鎊，都遭尤文拒絕。

今年夏天，車路士一直在求購辛祖，《晚旗報》指他們願意開出週薪超10萬鎊的合同，而尤文不想再放走後防主力，並向球員開出週薪達8.4萬鎊的續約合同。

另外，《晚旗報》表示，車路士正在以阿仙奴談判，希望以3500萬鎊簽下張伯倫，並且會再次報價李斯特城中場真禾特。

還有媒體表示，車路士對修咸頓中堅V.雲迪克、華倫西亞右閘祖奧簡斯路、巴黎聖日耳門右閘欧利亚和巴塞隆拿右閘羅羅拔圖感興趣。

與此同時，該報道還表示，祖雲達斯在順利召回斯湯馬士賓拿蘇拿之前也不會讓艾沙莫亞轉會離隊。這位加納國腳據説已經和土超豪門加拉塔沙雷談妥了一份為期四年，年薪為250萬歐元的合同。

After abandoning their pursuit of Riyad Mahrez, Roma are reportedly considering Juventus winger Juan Cuadrado.

The Giallorossi are looking to sign a right-winger after the departure of Mohamed Salah, but baulked at Leicester’s demands for Mahrez.

This morning’s Gazzetta dello Sport believes they have now turned their attentions to Cuadrado, but the deal could prove difficult for a number of reasons.

Coach Max Allegri considers the Colombian a key part of his squad, and would be reluctant to lose him.

However, the arrival of Keita Baldé Diao could change that, as the Bianconeri have already signed wingers Douglas Costa and Federico Bernardeschi, so if the Lazio man arrives too Cuadrado could fall down the pecking order.

For his part though, the player would prefer to remain in Turin and he wouldn’t come cheap for the Lupi.

Juve know that their Scudetto rivals bid €35m for Mahrez, so they’d want at least €30m for Cuadrado.

Stefan de Vrij will reportedly renew with Lazio, but with a €25m release clause in his contract.

The Dutch defender’s current deal expires next June, and it had been rumoured that he could sign a pre-contract agreement with Juventus in January.

However, this morning’s Corriere dello Sport says De Vrij doesn’t want to leave the club which launched his career in Italy on a fee, and negotiations are underway for a new contract.

The player is willing to accept a renewal with a €25m release clause, though the Biancocelesti will try to push that up to €30m.

That shouldn’t prove a big stumbling block though, and a deal could be closed by the end of the transfer window.

Keita Balde Diao did not turn up for Lazio training today, as he is determined to force through a transfer to Juventus.

The striker was dropped from the squad for Sunday’s 3-2 Italian Super Cup victory over Juve and reacted angrily via Twitter, insisting the decision had nothing to do with football.

The Aquile resumed training today, but Keita was nowhere to be seen.

It’s not yet clear whether this is a one-off incident or if the Senegal international is going on strike.

His contract with Lazio expires in June 2018, but he has turned down all offers that aren’t Juventus.

The two clubs haven’t agreed terms, as the Biancocelesti want €30m and so far the proposal is just over half that.

“We asked Atalanta if we could get him back a year early, paying the right money for him, but they said ‘no’ and we pulled out without any problems.

“We’re sorry for the player because he’d have a great opportunity here, but that’s football and it must be respected. Won’t he come? There’s still 15 days…

“Cuadrado, Alex Sandro and Asamoah? None of them have asked to be sold.

“The only one who’s asked us to stay is Alex Sandro and that gives us great pleasure, so we’ll definitely reject Chelsea’s offer at this time.

“Asamoah did mention the possibility of Galatasaray but didn’t ask to leave, like Cuadrado.

“These situations at the end of the window are common, but we’re not bitter about it.

“There are no such cases [of them leaving], but there are still 15 days for us to respond to any offers from other clubs.

“Bonucci? There’s no use talking about him. The only thing that matters is that he doesn’t cause us any grief with what he says.
